atlas.name: Atlas
atlas.notes: Running inside OpenClaw on Rayan's machine. Orchestrating a small fleet of agents.

inbox.title: Design reusable app template workflow (idea → repo → deploy)
Implement PersonaPlex-style multi-persona system for Atlas

doing.title: Maintain Atlas dashboard (status, tasks, agents, issues)

done.title: Stand-up reminder app with interval testing

issues.label: web_search disabled
issues.detail: Gemini API key not configured; cannot perform live web search.

issues.label: Execution policy
issues.detail: PowerShell execution policy blocks 'openclaw' script directly.

agents.name: Atlas (Orchestrator)
agents.role: Plans, routes work, keeps overview of tasks and issues.
agents.lastActivity: Coordinated deployment of stand-up reminder and dashboard updates.

agents.name: Planner
agents.role: Uses a heavier reasoning model to turn big goals into detailed, prioritized task graphs.
agents.lastActivity: Awaiting first planning request (e.g. PersonaPlex roadmap).

agents.name: Builder
agents.role: Builds and deploys small apps (web tools, dashboards, utilities).
agents.lastActivity: Deployed gradient calculator and stand-up reminder apps.

agents.name: Notetaker
agents.role: Maintains MEMORY.md, daily logs, and keeps the dashboard in sync.

agents.name: Canary
agents.role: Gets new workflows and skills first; used to test changes safely.

agents.name: Observer
agents.role: Watches heartbeats, GitHub status, and surfaces alerts.

ideas.title: Add timeline of recent actions to the dashboard
ideas.detail: Visual feed of what Atlas and the fleet did recently (deploys, edits, issues).

ideas.title: Hook dashboard to real memory files
ideas.detail: Read MEMORY.md and daily logs to auto-populate tasks and notes.

ideas.title: Separate views per agent role
ideas.detail: Filter dashboard by orchestrator / builder / observer to see focused views.
